1200006546.korean: 끝까지 널 지켜 볼 거야, 지석아…

1200006547.english: - Ji-seok's closed eyelids fluttered violently, then suddenly, his bloodshot eyeballs popped out.
1200006547.korean: - 지석의 감긴 눈꺼풀이 크게 요동치더니 번뜩, 충혈된 눈알을 뱉어냈다.

1200006548.english: - Catching his breath, he quickly looks around.
1200006548.korean: - 가쁜 숨을 고른 그가 서둘러 주위를 살핀다.

1200006549.english: - Several security secretaries' bodies, whether sleeping or dead, are left abandoned around the laboratory.
1200006549.korean: - 실험실 주위에 잠든 건지 죽은 건지 알 수 없는 몇몇 경호비서 육신이 방치되어 있다.

1200006554.english: How long was I asleep this time...?

1200006555.english: Ugh... it feels like my skull is going to split...

1200006557.english: I can overcome it with my mental strength...

1200006558.english: We have to find a way to wake Rachel up as soon as possible...
1200006558.korean: 한시라도 빨리 레이첼을 깨울 수 있는 방법을 찾아내야만 해…

1200006561.english: - Everything that makes up the space is blurry.

1200006562.english: - It's hard to tell if it's a delusion or real, but a bizarre metallic scraping sound continues to echo.
1200006562.korean: - 망상인지 실제인지 분간이 어렵지만, 기괴한 금속 마찰음이 계속해서 울려 퍼진다.

1200006565.english: - Ji-seok, his eyelids once again growing heavy, finally resorts to stabbing himself all over with a fountain pen.
1200006565.korean: - 지석은 또 다시 감겨 오는 눈꺼풀에 급기야 몸 여기저기를 만년필로 찔러댄다.

1200006567.english: You might never wake up again...
1200006567.korean: 다시는 깨어날 수 없을 지도 몰라…

1200006569.english: Were you in pain like this too...?

1200006570.english: I can't hold on any longer... with this body...
1200006570.korean: 더는… 이 육체로 버틸 수 없어…

1200006571.english: - His gaze lingers on the cloning machine for a long time.
1200006571.korean: - 그의 시선이 클로닝 기계에 장시간 머문다.

1200006572.english: - It was old-fashioned, having been first used in the Eva prototype procedure, but with a few adjustments, it could be operational right away.
1200006572.korean: - 에바 프로토타입 시술에 처음 사용된 구식이었지만, 몇 가지 손을 본다면 당장 동작시켜도 문제 될 게 없을 것이었다.

1200006573.english: - Tears are flowing non-stop from Ji-seok's eyes.
1200006573.korean: - 지석의 눈에서 눈물이 멈추지 않고 흐른다.

1200006574.english: Damn it... damn it... damn it...!!!

1200006575.english: You were a monster anyway, weren't you?

1200006576.english: It's just about returning to your true self,
1200006576.korean: 너의 진정한 모습으로 돌아가는 것 뿐인데,

1200006582.english: - Ji-seok stumbled, grabbing at scattered objects around him, and opened the warehouse door where discarded skeletons were piled together.
1200006582.korean: - 지석은 여기저기 흩어진 주변 사물을 부여잡고 휘청거리며 폐기 골격이 한데 모인 창고 문을 개방했다.

1200006584.korean: 내가 원했던 건 이런 게 아녔어!!!

1200006585.english: No matter how much I struggle...

1200006587.english: - The bio-droid skeleton, which was decided to be scrapped mid-experiment, looks eerily like a pile of chopped-up corpses.
1200006587.korean: - 실험 중 중도 폐기 결정된 바이오로이드용 골격이 흡사 토막 난 시체더미 같다.

1200006589.korean: 분명 레이첼이 날 못 알아 볼 거야…

1200006592.english: Rachel will recognize you no matter what you look like.
1200006592.korean: 레이첼은 네가 어떤 모습을 하든 널 알아볼 거야.

1200006594.english: - Ji-seok takes the case out of his pocket with trembling hands.
1200006594.korean: - 지석은 떨리는 손으로 주머니에서 케이스를 꺼내든다.

1200006598.english: There is no such thing as a god!

1200006599.english: Now that you've become an omnipotent being,

1200006600.english: It's a fresh start for everything!!!

1200006603.english: We're going back... to the beginning...

1200006604.english: - The one who loves creates because they despise.
1200006604.korean: - 사랑하는 자는 경멸하기 때문에 창조하려고 한다.

1200006605.english: - My brother, enter into your solitude with your love, your creation.
1200006605.korean: - 나의 형제여, 그대의 사랑, 그대의 창조와 함께 그대의 고독 속으로 들어가라.

1200006606.english: - I love the one who destroys himself in order to create beyond himself.
1200006606.korean: - 나는 자기 자신을 넘어 창조하려고 파멸하는 자를 사랑한다.

1200006610.english: - Just as evil begins with good,

1200006611.english: - Because there is light, darkness continues to fill the empty space today.
1200006611.korean: - 빛이 있기에, 어둠은 오늘도 빈 공간을 채워나간다.

1200006612.english: Record number 20660605 indicates an abnormal termination.
1200006612.korean: 레코드 번호 20660605의 기록이 비정상 종료 확인,

1200006613.english: The recording for 20_6_0_1 will play automatically.

1200006614.english: That day, by killing my younger sister 'Rachel', I opened 'Pandora's Box'.
1200006614.korean: 나는 그날, 나의 여동생 '레이첼'을 죽임으로써 '판도라의 상자'를 열어버렸다.

1200006615.english: By eliminating the first human test subject infected with Hypnos, possibly the first ever...
1200006615.korean: 최초일지 모를 휩노스 감염 피실험체를 인멸함으로…

1200006616.english: Because I turned my brother, 'Kim Ji-seok', into a devil.

1200006617.english: ...perhaps he is receiving that punishment now.
1200006617.korean: …어쩌면 지금 그 벌을 받고 있는 것일지 모른다.

1200006618.english: I don't think this will wash the blood from my hands.
1200006618.korean: 이것으로 내 손에 묻힌 피를 씻을 수 있을 거라 생각지 않는다.

1200006619.english: The punishment I truly deserve is,

1200006621.english: By leaving the last 'hope', I will try to complete my penance.
1200006621.korean: 마지막 '희망'을 남김으로써 속죄의 벌을 다하려 한다.

1200006622.english: There's one truth I couldn't tell Ji-seok until the very end.
1200006622.korean: 지석이한테 끝까지 말하지 못한 하나의 진실이 있다.

1200006623.english: The bi-oroids produced in small numbers for Project are

1200006624.english: They are like my children, based on my and Eva's DNA.
1200006624.korean: 나와 에바의 DNA를 바탕으로한, 나의 자식들이나 다름없다.

1200006625.english: If I were to have children, just like I did...

1200006626.english: I hope they, too, will have siblings and live their lives relying on and supporting each other.
1200006626.korean: 녀석도 형제지간을 두고 서로가 서로를 의지하고 지탱해주며 살아가기를…

1200006627.english: Please, may I never repeat the mistake of treating Ji-seok harshly...
1200006627.korean: 부디 내가 지석에게 모질게 굴었던 실수를 반복하는 일이 없기를…

1200006628.english: One of the two ______________ I possessed was,
1200006628.korean: 내가 지니던 두 개의 ______________ 중 하나는,

1200006629.english: I used it hoping that I wouldn't suffer from an illness with an unknown cause, like Hypnos.
1200006629.korean: 혹여나 휩노스 처럼 원인을 알 수 없는 병에 고통받지 않길 바라며 사용하였다.

1200006630.english: My new hope will one day escape this dark box,
1200006630.korean: 내 새로운 희망이 언젠가는 이 어두컴컴한 상자 속을 벗어나,

1200006631.english: Hoping you will shine your light upon the world...

1200006632.english: Would you like to save the project record?

1200006633.english: Please enter the title of the project.

1200006637.english: The name of the project is...

1200006643.english: - I feel a pain like something is breaking on my back.&nMy body hurts so much that I can't move at all.
1200006643.korean: - 등에서 부서지는 것 같은 아픔을 느낀다.&n몸이 너무 아파 도저히 움직일 수가 없다.

1200006644.english: - I don't even have the strength to open my eyes, so I wonder where I am in the darkness.&nHowever, I can't think of anything, and my head just aches intensely.
1200006644.korean: - 눈을 뜰 힘도 없어 어둠 속에서 여기가 어딜까 생각한다.&n하지만, 아무 것도 생각나지 않고 머리만 격렬하게 아파온다.

1200006645.english: - When I was about to give up thinking in pain, a voice came.
1200006645.korean: - 고통 속에서 생각하는 것을 그만 두려고 할 때, 목소리가 들려왔다.

1200006646.english: Are they breathing? It feels alive!&nI thought it was already dead... If I had been just a little bit later, something terrible would have happened, wouldn't it?
1200006646.korean: 숨은 쉬는데? 살아 있는 것 같아!&n벌써 죽어 버린 줄 알았는데… 조금만 늦었으면 큰일 날 뻔 했겠는데?

1200006647.english: Griffon, please speak a little more politely. I've finally found the human... He's going to be our master.
1200006647.korean: 그리폰, 조금 더 정중하게 말하렴. 드디어 찾은 인간님인데... 우리 주인이 되실 분이잖아.

1200006648.english: - Who is it? I hear an unknown voice.
1200006648.korean: - 누구지? 알 수 없는 목소리가 들린다.

1200006649.english: Hmph, what owner? I haven't acknowledged you as my master yet, you know? ... Anyway, give him that shot first. His breathing is getting shallow, so...
1200006649.korean: 흥, 주인은 무슨. 난 아직 주인이라고 인정 안했거든? … 어쨌든 그 주사부터 놔. 슬슬 숨소리가 간당간당해지고 있으니까

1200006650.english: - My neck started to sting, and something is being injected into my body. Is that a syringe needle?
1200006650.korean: - 목 옆이 따끔하더니 무언가 내 몸에 주입되고 있다. 주사 바늘인가?

1200006651.english: I hope this wakes you up...

1200006652.english: Did it come back to life? Are you blinking? It looks like it's not even breathing properly.
1200006652.korean: 살아났나? 눈을 깜빡거리는데? 숨도 제대로 쉬는 것 같아.

1200006657.english: (For some reason, Rachel's cheeks look puffy today.)

1200006658.english: - Ji-seok unconsciously reached out and stroked Rachel's cheek as she sat across from him.
1200006658.korean: - 지석은 무심코 손가락을 뻗어 마주 앉은 레이첼의 뺨을 어루만졌다.

1200006659.english: - I can feel the soft down.

1200006663.english: - Rachel began to blush, turning as red as a ripe cherry.
1200006663.korean: - 레이첼은 잘 익은 앵두처럼 빨개지기 시작했다.

1200006667.english: - Jiseok scratched his head awkwardly and said.
1200006667.korean: - 지석은 머쓱한듯 자신의 머리를 긁으면서 말했다.

1200006669.english: Homework... I have to do it.

1200006670.english: (The reason I probably started liking Rachel was...)

1200006673.english: (... Oh, no. So it was all a dream after all...)

1200006674.english: (I've been sleeping a lot more lately...)

1200006676.english: - A single tear slides down Jiseok's cheek.
1200006676.korean: - 지석의 뺨에 눈물 한 방울이 미끄러지며 흘러내린다.

1200006682.english: Chairman Adam... oh, no... Mr. Adam Jones...
1200006682.korean: 애덤 회장님… 아, 아니… 애덤 존스 님께서…

1200006685.english: I'll follow right behind you. For now, just get ready to leave immediately.
1200006685.korean: 나도 바로 뒤따라갈게, 일단 바로 나갈 수 있게 채비해둬.

1200006686.english: Yes, I will prepare it right away.

1200006689.english: (I should probably go and check it out quickly too...)

1200006691.english: - Something fell out of Ji-seok's lab coat pocket as he was hurriedly getting ready to leave.
1200006691.korean: - 서둘러 나갈 채비를 하는 지석의 랩 가운 주머니에서 무언가가 떨어져 나왔다.

1200006693.english: Oh yeah, there was something like this...

1200006697.english: - Someone else urgently knocked and came in again.
1200006697.korean: - 다시 누군가가 다급히 노크를 하며 들어왔다.

1200006701.english: - Ji-seok put down something he was holding in his hand on the desk, and then,
1200006701.korean: - 지석은 손에 들고 있는 무언가를 책상에 내려놓은 채,

1200006703.english: Rachel, when the flowers bloom, will you come with me...?

1200006705.english: Let's start over from the beginning.

1200006708.english: - Along with the pleasantly swaying breeze,

1200006709.english: - Ji-seok left with a light smile.
1200006709.korean: - 지석은 가벼운 미소를 지으며 자리를 떠났다.

1431100001.english: - Suddenly the commanders called a serious meeting with stern faces. &nWorried it might be for something bad, Arsenal raised her hand high.
1431100001.korean: - 갑작스레 지휘관들이 진지한 얼굴로 회의를 소집했다.&n혹시나 좋지 않은 일로 부른 건가 싶어 걱정되던 와중, 아스널이 손을 번쩍 들었다.

1431100002.english: My dear, I called you because there's something very important.&nKhan made the proposal first, can you accept it?
1431100002.korean: 그대여, 아주 중요한 일이 있어 불렀다. &n먼저 제안한 건 칸인데, 들어줄 수 있겠나?

1431100003.english: - I broke out in a cold sweat seeing Arsenal, who are usually so relaxed, looking so serious.
1431100003.korean: -늘 여유로운 아스널의 진지한 모습에 식은땀이 흘렀다.

1431100004.english: This matter is also related to the morale of the resistance... The commander's permission is absolutely necessary.
1431100004.korean: 이 일은 저항군의 사기와도 관련된 일이니... 사령관의 허락이 꼭 필요하다.

1431100005.english: - What could be going on that even Khan is acting like that?
1431100005.korean: - 대체 무슨 일이기에 칸까지 저러는 걸까?

1431100006.english: Recently... the addition of Orca Park and Aqualand has significantly increased the satisfaction of many of our members, however...
1431100006.korean: 최근… 오르카 파크랑 아쿠아랜드가 있어 많은 대원분들의 만족도가 높아졌습니다만은…

1431100007.english: It was suggested that the adult members needed entertainment specifically for adults.
1431100007.korean: 성인인 대원들에겐 성인만을 위한 오락거리가 필요하다는 의견이 나왔습니다.

1431100009.english: The Horde members made suggestions…  &nThe main agenda is to build an adult casino in Aqualand.
1431100009.korean: 호드 대원들이 건의하더군...&n아쿠아랜드에 성인 카지노를 만들어달라는 건의가 주 안건이다.

1431100010.english: - Casinos were a form of entertainment that humans frequently used even before the apocalypse, but...&nI ended up worrying unnecessarily because of the chronic problems among the Horde members.
1431100010.korean: -카지노, 멸망 전 인간들도 자주 이용했던 오락거리긴 했지만... &n호드 대원들의 고질적인 문제 때문에 괜스레 고민이 됐다.

1431100011.english: I think it's a good idea.&nHowever, considering the risk of easily becoming addicted to gambling...
1431100011.korean: 좋은 의견이라곤 생각해요.&n하지만 중독되기 쉬운 도박의 위험성을 생각해 본다면...

1431100012.english: Yeah, I also disagreed with Khan's opinion at first.
1431100012.korean: 그래, 나도 처음에는 칸의 의견에 반대했지.

1431100013.english: However, after hearing Captain Khan's "nice offer," I changed my mind.
1431100013.korean: 하지만 칸 대장의 '나이스한 제안'을 듣고 마음을 바꾸게 됐다.

1431100014.english: - Seeing Arsenal's meaningful expression made me feel a little uneasy.
1431100014.korean: - 아스널의 의미심장한 표정을 보니 어딘가 살짝 불안해졌다.

1431100015.english: Rather than a cash competition that's easy to get addicted to... &nThey say they've changed their policy to rank players each season and award prizes.
1431100015.korean: 중독되기 쉬운 현금 경쟁보단... &n매 시즌 순위를 매겨 경품을 타는 쪽으로 운영 방침을 바꿨다는군요.

1431100016.english: If we replace cash with prizes, it'll not only be relatively wholesome… but also a big help in boosting the squad's morale. &nEveryone who wants to participate will be given a basic chip free of charge…  &nAnd if they need more chips to get into the rankings, they can purchase them using their own tuna cans…
1431100016.korean: 현금 대신 경품으로 대체한다면 비교적 건전할 뿐만 아니라… 대원들 사기 진작에 큰 도움이 될 거야.&n누구에게나 참가를 원하는 자에게 기본 칩은 무상으로 지급하고...&n만약 순위권에 들기 위해 추가로 칩이 필요하다면 자신의 참치캔을 이용해 구매하는 식으로…

1431100017.english: The tuna cans purchased additionally will be used transparently for the welfare of the Orca crew, so you don't need to worry, Your Excellency.
1431100017.korean: 추가 구입으로 사용된 참치캔은 오르카 대원 복지에 투명하게 쓰일 예정이니 걱정하지 않으셔도 됩니다, 각하.

1431100019.english: President... This kind of product will undoubtedly be a huge boost to Steel Line's morale.
1431100019.korean: 통령... 이 정도 상품이라면 스틸라인의 사기진작에 막대한 도움이 될 것이 틀림없다.

1431100020.english: To be honest, I'm not sure I have a good feel for it... whether it's healthy or not...
1431100020.korean: 전 솔직히 말씀드리면 감이 잘 오질 않아요… 건전한 게 맞는지…

1431100021.english: - I don't know what the prize was, but... there was a heated debate among the commanders.&nWatching him get so excited and emphasize the prizes so much, a strange sense of unease washes over me...
1431100021.korean: - 무엇이 경품으로 걸린 건지 알 수 없지만… 지휘관들 사이 상당히 열띤 토론이 펼쳐졌다.&n유독 경품을 강조하며 흥분하는 걸 보고 있자니, 이유 모를 불안감이 엄습해온다…

1431100022.english: Just a moment, everyone. But Master hasn't even given permission yet, has he?
1431100022.korean: 잠깐만요… 여러분. 아직 주인님께서 허락하시지도 않으셨잖아요?

1431100023.english: What's there to allow? Of course, it's a proposal you would gladly accept.
1431100023.korean: 허락할 게 뭐가 있나? 당연히 그대라면 반갑게 받아들일 제안이다.

1431100024.english: Chief of Staff, please explain the proposal in detail to His Excellency.
1431100024.korean: 참모총장, 각하께 제안 사항을 자세히 설명하게.

1431100025.english: - Amidst the chaos, Dragon, who had been silent until now, calmed the commanders.
1431100025.korean: - 어수선한 와중, 여태 말을 아끼던 용이 지휘관들을 진정시켰다.

1431100026.english: You haven't even said the Lord has given permission, so why are you all acting so rashly?
1431100026.korean: 주군께서 허가하신단 말씀도 없으셨는데 어째서 이리 경망들을 보이고 있소?

1431100027.english: - After Dragon finally calmed the atmosphere, Arsenal continued to explain things to me calmly.
1431100027.korean: - 용이 겨우 분위기를 가라앉히자, 아스널이 내게 차근히 설명을 이어갔다.

1431100028.english: My friend, you know that the casinos before the destruction caused serious gambling addiction.&nThinking about it, I can understand why you're so seriously worried.
1431100028.korean: 그대여, 멸망 전 카지노는 심각한 도박 중독을 야기했다는 사실은 안다.&n생각해보면 그대가 심각하게 걱정하는 것도 이해하지.

1431100029.english: To prevent gambling addiction among the adult members, I thought it would be better to give out prizes equivalent to tuna cans rather than tuna cans themselves.
1431100029.korean: 성인 대원들의 도박 중독을 막기 위해선… 참치캔보단 그에 준하는 경품을 지급하는 게 옳다고 보았다.

1431100030.english: The fourth prize is two chests of gold coins that Triaina found in a deep-sea shipwreck, and the third prize is a 7-day pass to Aqualand Beauty Care.
1431100030.korean: 4등 상품은 트리아이나가 심해 난파선에서 찾아온 금화 두 궤짝, 3등 상품은 아쿠아랜드 뷰티케어 7일 이용권이야.

1431100031.english: And the second prize is a 10-minute unlimited use ticket for the Saman Materials Sales Office.
1431100031.korean: 그리고 2등 상품은 삼안 물자 영업소 10분 무제한 이용권.

1431100032.english: Fufut… and the 1st place prize is a "2 nights 3 days" couple trip with the Commander.
1431100032.korean: 후훗... 그리고 1등 상품은 사령관과의 '2박 3일' 커플 여행권이야.

1431100033.english: In other words, if you win first place, you get the exclusive right to Darling for three days and two nights.
1431100033.korean: 다시 말해, 1등을 하면, 2박 3일간 달링을 단독으로 독점할 권리가 생긴다는 거지.

1431100034.english: My lord has been exhausted from his heavy workload, and I also believe a suitable vacation is necessary.
1431100034.korean: 그간 주군은 격무에 지쳤으니, 적당한 휴가가 필요하다고 소관 또한 생각되오.

1431100035.english: - No way, I'm forced to play for three days and two nights!&nThis is abuse for someone whose work is their hobby!
1431100035.korean: - 안 돼, 2박 3일 동안 강제로 놀 수밖에 없잖아! &n일이 취미인 사람한테 이건 학대야!

1431100036.english: - But putting that aside... If you were going on a couple's trip for 2 nights and 3 days...?
1431100036.korean: - 그런데 그건 둘째 치고... 2박 3일 동안 커플 여행을 간다면…?

1431100037.english: In other words, I can spend two nights and three days with you having a hot time.
1431100037.korean: 즉, 2박 3일 동안 그대와 화끈한 밤을 보낼 수 있다는 거지.

1431100038.english: - No wonder the commanders' eyes seemed to light up.

1431100039.english: Master, this opinion was unanimously agreed upon during the preliminary consultation.
1431100039.korean: 주인님, 이 의견에 대해 사전 협의 시 만장일치로 동의했습니다.

1431100040.english: - As Alpha snapped her fingers, Dragon snatched the panel on the table.
1431100040.korean: - 알파가 손가락을 튕기자, 테이블 위에 놓인 패널을 용이 가로챘다.

1431100041.english: Uh, it was an unavoidable choice, my lord. This is... It's just a way to improve the lord's health and boost the morale of our Orca resistance!
1431100041.korean: 어, 어쩔 수 없는 선택이었소, 주군. 이건... 주군의 건강과 우리 오르카 저항군의 사기를 올리는 방법일 뿐이오…!

1431100043.english: As expected, betting with real money and causing gambling addiction is worse than...&nI think it's much better to promote 'healthy prizes' like this.
1431100043.korean: 역시 현물을 걸고 도박 중독을 유발하는 것보다... &n이렇게 '건전한 경품'을 내세우는 게 훨씬 더 좋은 것 같아요.

1431100044.english: - A 2-night, 3-day travel voucher also seems quite far from being "healthy," doesn't it?
1431100044.korean: - 2박 3일 여행권도 '건전'과는 거리가 상당히 먼 것 같은데?

1431100045.english: There's no better choice for legally confiscating Master's panel and helping them rest.
1431100045.korean: 주인님의 패널을 합법적으로 압수하고 쉴 수 있도록 돕는 데에선 이보다 좋은 선택지를 찾을 수가 없네요.

1431100046.english: My lord, please don't worry about the Metal Parasites.&nSince I've been informed that there have been no particular issues recently,
1431100046.korean: 주군, 혹시라도 철충에 대한 건 걱정 마시오. &n요 근래 특이사항은 없다고 보고를 받았으니.

1431100047.english: - You didn't block all my excuses in advance, did you?
1431100047.korean: - 설마 내 핑계들을 모두 사전에 차단해둔 거야?

1431100048.english: Don't worry, Commander. In case of any unforeseen circumstances, our horde will take responsibility and sortie.&nRemember, this is a crucial matter that is absolutely necessary to boost the morale of the team members.
1431100048.korean: 걱정 말아라 사령관. 혹시나 돌발 상황이 생긴다면 우리 호드가 책임지고 출격할 테니. &n이건 대원의 사기 진작을 위해 꼭 필요한 중대 사항임을 명심해라.

1431100049.english: Hut… perhaps I should also learn some poker from the members.
1431100049.korean: 훗… 이참에 나도 대원들에게 포커를 좀 배워야겠군.

1431100050.english: - It feels like I'm constantly being cornered.
1431100050.korean: - 어째 코너에 계속 몰리는 것 같은데.

1431100051.english: Then, now it begins. Then, from now on...

1431100052.english: Orca Casino is hosting a gambling event!

1431100053.english: - When I said I was going to hold a sudden competition, did they feel exactly like this...?
1431100053.korean: - 내가 뜬금없는 대회를 개최한다고 했을 때 이들의 심정이 딱 이랬을까...?

1431100054.english: I will allocate the necessary materials for building the casino facilities.
1431100054.korean: 카지노 시설을 만드는데 필요한 물자를 할당하도록 하겠습니다.

1431100055.english: And I'll have Constantia announce the details confirmed today to all the crew members.
1431100055.korean: 그리고 콘스탄챠 님께 금일 확정된 내역을 전 대원들에게 공지하도록 할게요.

1431100056.english: - And so, the casino rumble began for all the Orca crew members except me.
1431100056.korean: - 그렇게 나를 제외한 모든 오르카 대원들의 카지노 럼블이 시작되었다.

1431100057.english: - I was on my way out after being forced to take a vacation until the winner of the casino gambling was decided.
1431100057.korean: - 카지노 겜블의 우승자가 정해질 때까지 강제로 휴가를 받고 나오는 길이었다.

1431100058.english: Fafnir, buy this for me quickly!

1431100059.english: If you don't buy it this time, I'm really going to put it on credit under Fafnir's name and run away, okay?
1431100059.korean: 이번에 안 사주면 진짜 파프니르 이름으로 외상 달아두고 도망간다?

1431100060.english: Stop begging for food, you guys! You guys will be getting paid by Orca too, right?
1431100060.korean: 이것들이 그만 좀 얻어 먹으라고! 너희들도 오르카에서 월급 받을 거 아냐!

1431100061.english: Hey, but Fafnir is still the richest among us, right? They say Fatima will give you a discount if you bring Fafnir.
1431100061.korean: 에이, 그래도 우리 중에 가장 돈이 많은 건 파프니르잖아. 파티마는 파프니르만 데리고 오면 할인 해준다는데?

1431100062.english: Why don't you treat us to something cool instead, Fafnir?
1431100062.korean: 그러지 말고 시원하게 한턱 쏘는 건 어때 파프니르?

1431100064.english: - Today, Fafnir was once again being extorted by her subordinates.

1431100065.english: What the heck are you doing?! You're not going to ask me to buy it for you too, are you?&nThey always come and ask me to buy them things... Where did they even leave their conscience!
1431100065.korean: 뭐야 너! 너도 설마 나한테 사달라고 하는 건 아니지?&n이것들이 맨날 와서 사달라고 해… 진짜 양심 어디다 갖다 버렸어!

1431100068.english: They took a bunch yesterday too!&nDo you know how much gold I've given to Orca so far?!"
1431100068.korean: 어제도 잔뜩 털어가더니! &n내가 여태껏 오르카에 금을 얼마나 갖다 바쳤는지 알아?!

1431100069.english: - Gold... Come to think of it, didn't they say the fourth prize at the casino was a gold coin? That should be good news for Fafnir.
1431100069.korean: - 금… 그러고 보니 카지노 4등 경품이 금화라고 했지? 파프니르한텐 좋은 소식일 텐데.

1431100070.english: What's that? The gold I paid for, is it being returned as cashback?
1431100070.korean: 그게 뭔데? 내가 냈던 금, 캐시백으로 돌려주는 거야?

1431100071.english: - I really want to get it back...

1431100072.english: - I brought up the rumor to Fafnir that the Orca Casino was going to be built near Aqualand.&nFafnir, who had been listening listlessly, suddenly widened her eyes the moment she heard about the gold coins.
1431100072.korean: - 나는 오르카 카지노가 아쿠아랜드 쪽에 건설된다는 이야기를 파프니르에게 꺼냈다.&n심드렁하게 듣던 파프니르는 이윽고 금화를 듣자마자 눈을 크게 떴다.

1431100073.english: Really? So, the fourth-place prize is the gold coins that Triaina brought?
1431100073.korean: 정말이야? 그럼 4등이 트리아이나가 찾아온 금화란 말이지?

1431100074.english: Fafnir... normally, aren't you not interested in anything else?
1431100074.korean: 파프니르… 보통이라면 다른 거에 끌리지 않아?

1431100075.english: You should be more excited about going on a trip with the commander. Idiot.
1431100075.korean: 사령관이랑 여행간다는 걸 더 좋아해야 정상이잖아. 바보.

1431100076.english: That gold coin is definitely mine. This is my chance to fill my empty treasure vault!
1431100076.korean: 그 금화, 무조건 내 거야. 내 텅텅 빈 보물고를 채울 절호의 찬스라고!

1431100077.english: Treasure vault? Didn't Haka break it with her own hands before?
1431100077.korean: 보물고? 하카는 전에 자기 손으로 부수지 않았어?

1431100078.english: I think they're talking about their own dorm locker.
1431100078.korean: 자기 숙소 캐비닛 말하는 거 같은데.

1431100079.english: Quiet! Anyway, that's good news. I'm definitely going to win that gold as a prize!
1431100079.korean: 시끄러워! 하여튼 좋은 소식이네. 그 금 만큼은 내가 꼭 경품으로 가져갈 거야!

1431100080.english: - Fafnir confidently smiled as if to say, "You can expect great things," and then disappeared.
1431100080.korean: - 파프니르는 기대하란 듯 자신만만하게 웃으며 사라졌다.

1431100081.english: Fafnir, you lost all the time when you played cards with Sterling too, didn't you?
1431100081.korean: 파프니르, 스털링하고 카드놀이 할 때도 허구한 날 졌잖아.

1431100082.english: I've played over 500 games, and I still don't think I understand the rules.
1431100082.korean: 500판을 넘게 해도 룰 이해를 못했던 것 같은데.

1431100083.english: - ... Of course, it didn't seem like there was a future where Fafnir could reclaim the gold.
1431100083.korean: - ...물론 파프니르가 금을 탈환할 수 있는 미래가 보이는 것 같진 않았지만.

1431100088.english: Could you explain it to me too?

1431100089.english: Okay... Okay. So... what exactly is a prize?
1431100089.korean: 그래... 알겠어. 그래서… 경품이 란 게 대체 뭐야?

1431100090.english: Oh, that's pretty good, isn't it?

1431100093.english: What are you going to do if the Iron Beasts attack?!

1431100094.english: That was originally my line, wasn't it?!

1431100097.english: Fafnir, do you have good news?

1441100001.english: Alcyone...? Why are you suddenly crying?
1441100001.korean: 야, 바르그! 소식 들었어? 아쿠아랜드 쪽에 카지노 생긴다던데? 경품으로 금화도 걸었다고!

1441100002.english: If it's a casino... Isn't that a place for gambling?

1441100003.english: Fufu… so I can finally get back the gold Orca took from me!
1441100003.korean: 후후… 그간 내가 오르카에 뜯긴 금을 다시 찾을 수 있단 거지!

1441100006.english: ...I wonder if you'll be able to find the gold again.&nAnd gold coins... can they be exchanged for tuna cans within Orca?
1441100006.korean: …과연 네가 금을 다시 찾을 수 있을지 모르겠군.&n그리고 금화… 오르카 내에선 참치캔으로 바꿀 순 있나?

1441100007.english: Well, I'm not sure... Hmm, but it's probably good to have it anyway! Just looking at it makes me feel full, doesn't it?
1441100007.korean: 글쎄 잘 모르겠는데… 으음, 그래도 가지고 있으면 좋겠지! 보기만 해도 배부르잖아?

1441100008.english: Just one question, Fafnir. So, are there enough cans of tuna to get that gold coin?
1441100008.korean: 하나만 묻지, 파프니르. 그래서 그 금화를 따기위한 참치캔은 충분하나?

1441100009.english: Then, I starved myself and worked like crazy to save it!
1441100009.korean: 그럼, 내가 밥도 굶어가면서 죽어라 모아뒀다고!

1441100010.english: Battery... perfect timing! Can you lend me a can of tuna? I'll pay you back when my part-time job money comes in next month.
1441100010.korean: 배터리~ 마침 잘 됐다~ 나 참치캔 좀 꿔주라. 다음 달 알바비 들어오면 갚을게.

1441100011.english: Hey, you borrowed from me yesterday too!

1441100012.english: Oh, the price of Hot Pack's limited edition photocards has gone up so much that I can't afford them.
1441100012.korean: 아~ 핫팩 한정 포카 가격이 너무 뛰어서 안 되겠더라고.

1441100014.english: Oh, are you really going to do this? Why are you acting like that with us? Have I ever borrowed something and not paid it back?
1441100014.korean: 아~ 진짜 이러기야? 우리 사이에 왜 그래~ 내가 언제 빌리고 안 갚은 적 있어?

1441100015.english: You're not paying back now, you're just keeping on borrowing!
1441100015.korean: 지금 안 갚고 계속 빌려가기만 하잖아!

1441100016.english: Hey, Babonir. Lend me some too. I'll pay you back soon.
1441100016.korean: 야, 바보니르. 나도 좀 빌려주라. 조만간 갚을게.

1441100017.english: These things keep... Do you think I'm a wallet?
1441100017.korean: 이것들이 자꾸... 내가 지갑인 줄 알아?

1441100018.english: I'll pay you back for the battery, I promise. Have we ever not paid you back?
1441100018.korean: 배터리, 갚는다니까. 우리가 언제 안 갚은 적 있어?

1441100019.english: Wow, Babonir. You've been yelling at your older sisters lately. You've grown a lot, haven't you?
1441100019.korean: 이야, 바보니르. 요새 언니들한테 큰 소리도 지르고. 많이 컸네?

1441100021.english: Why are you suddenly trying to borrow a can of tuna?
1441100021.korean: 뭔데 갑자기 참치캔을 빌리려고 하는 거지?

1441100022.english: They say they're building a new casino in Orca. There's no harm in gathering bullets in advance.
1441100022.korean: 오르카에 카지노 새로 만든다잖아. 미리 총알 모아서 나쁠 건 없지.

1441100023.english: That's not healthy. Gambling is practically a shortcut to ruin.
1441100023.korean: 건전하지 못하군. 도박은 패가망신의 지름길이나 다름 없다.

1441100024.english: If you hear what the prize is, those stuffy ideas of yours will change in a flash~ First place gets... well... Hot Pack, plus a 3-day, 2-night exclusive travel voucher~
1441100024.korean: 경품이 뭔지 들으면 고리타분한 생각이 휙 바뀔 걸? &n1위가 글쎄... 핫팩이랑 2박 3일 단독 여행권이야~

1441100026.english: A bit of moderate amusement is just the right thing to soothe a tired mind and body.
1441100026.korean: 절제할 정도의 유희는 지친 심신을 달래기 딱 안성맞춤이지.

1441100027.english: Are there other prizes besides that, by any chance?
1441100027.korean: 혹시 그것 말고도 다른 경품이 있나?

1441100028.english: I didn't ask about any other prizes because I wasn't particularly interested in them.
1441100028.korean: 딱히 다른 경품은 관심 없어서 안 물어봤는데.

1441100029.english: As I recall, third place was a 7-day pass to Aqualand Beauty Care... second place was a free pass to the Saman sales office, and...
1441100029.korean: 내 기억으론 3등이 아쿠아랜드 뷰티케어 7일 이용권… 2등은 삼안 영업소 자유 이용권, 그리고…

1441100030.english: Fourth place gets two chests of gold coins. I'm taking it, so everyone back off.
1441100030.korean: 4등은 금화 두 궤짝. 내가 가져 갈 거니까 다들 신경 꺼.

1441100031.english: That woman is the type who will take gold with her all the way to the underworld... Does she really need that much?
1441100031.korean: 저년은 저승까지 황금 싸들고 갈 년이네… 그게 그렇게 필요해?

1441100032.english: Of course! Do you know how much gold Orca has ripped off me all this time?
1441100032.korean: 당연하지! 내가 그동안 얼마나 많은 황금을 오르카에 뜯겼는지 아냐고!

1441100033.korean: 야, 그거 혹시라도 참치캔으로 환전 가능하다고 하면 나도 좀 주라.

1441100034.english: I'm not giving it to you, no way! How much have I bought you over the years!
1441100034.korean: 절대 안 줘! 내가 그간 사준 게 얼만데!

1441100035.english: But you. Do you know how to play any casino games?
1441100035.korean: 그런데 너. 카지노 게임 중에 할 줄 아는 거 있어?

1441100036.english: Hey, don't ignore me! I know how to play poker, you know?
1441100036.korean: 무, 무시하지 마! 포커 정도는 할 줄 알 거든?

1441100037.english: Battery, do you want me to teach you a bit? Just pay the training fee and I'll make you a master right away.
1441100037.korean: 배터리~ 내가 좀 가르쳐줄까? 강습비만 주면 바로 마스터 시켜줄게.

1441100039.english: - A few months later, I heard that a casino had opened in Aqualand, so I decided to go and take a look out of curiosity.
1441100039.korean: - 몇 달 후, 아쿠아랜드에 카지노가 오픈되었다는 소식을 들은 난 한 번 구경 삼아 시찰하기로 했다.

1441100040.english: - From the dazzling entrance, Armand was the first to come out and greet me.
1441100040.korean: - 휘황찬란한 입구에서부터 아르망이 먼저 마중나와 나를 맞이했다.

1441100042.english: Due to my abilities, I couldn't participate, so I decided to be the dealer.
1441100042.korean: 제 능력 특성 상, 참가를 할 수 없어서 딜러를 맡기로 했습니다.

1441100043.english: - Well, if you used your precognitive abilities for gambling, it would be practically a guaranteed first place...
1441100043.korean: - 하긴, 예지 능력을 도박에 쓴다면 거의 1등은 따놓은 당상이나 다름없지...

1441100044.english: No, Your Majesty. Even just with the foresight to see the outcome in advance, it's still plenty fun.
1441100044.korean: 아뇨, 폐하. 승패를 미리 들여다보는 예지로도 충분히 재밌습니다.

1441100045.english: By the way, since you've come all the way here, would you like to take a look around together?
1441100045.korean: 그나저나 모처럼 오셨는데, 한 번 같이 둘러보시지 않겠습니까?

1441100046.english: - I nodded and decided to look around the casino with Armand.&nDespite being the first day of opening, many members have come to play and are intensely focused on the game with fire in their eyes.
1441100046.korean: - 나는 고개를 끄덕거리며 아르망과 함께 카지노를 둘러보기로 했다.&n오픈 첫날임에도 불구하고 많은 대원들이 놀러와 눈에 불을 켜며 게임을 전념하고 있다.

1441100048.english: The goddess of fortune is smiling on me today, isn't she?
1441100048.korean: 행운의 여신이 오늘은 나한테 미소를 짓는데?

1441100049.english: - ... As expected, the satisfaction level seemed highest among the Horde members.

1441100050.english: Beast Hunter, don't touch the gun. Fingers flying off?
1441100050.korean: 비스트 헌터, 패 건들지 마라. 손가락 날아간다?

1441100051.english: Captain, do we really have to go this far?!

1441100052.english: Fufu… haven't you learned that if you get caught lying, you'll pay for it?
1441100052.korean: 후후... 구라치다 걸리면 피보는 거 안 배웠나?

1441100053.english: - ...I also saw some members working hard because of the prizes.

1441100054.english: - I'm not sure if I should be happy or sad, but... Since the crew members seem happy, I've decided to think positively for now.&nWhile inspecting the casino like that, I heard the loud voice of a familiar blue-haired member.
1441100054.korean: - 좋아해야 할지, 슬퍼해야 할지 잘 모르겠지만... 대원들이 행복해보이니, 일단은 좋게 생각하기로 결정했다.&n그렇게 카지노를 시찰하던 중, 나는 익숙한 파란 머리의 대원의 고성을 들었다.

1441100055.english: Alcyone! I was just looking for you, and you were here all along?
1441100055.korean: 야! 다시해, 진짜 이길 수 있었다고!

1441100056.english: Fafnir... How did you think a one pair could beat a triple?
1441100056.korean: 파프니르... 어떻게 원 페어로 트리플을 이길 수 있다고 생각했어?

1441100058.english: I've gotten everything done, just like my daughter. I'll go.
1441100058.korean: 난 딸 만큼 다 땄어. 가볼게.

1441100059.english: No! Do it again, this time you can really win!! Sterling, where are you going? Do it again!
1441100059.korean: 안 돼! 다시 해, 이번엔 진짜로 이길 수 있어!! 스털링, 어디 가? 다시해!

1441100060.english: - I naturally walked over to Fafnir's poker table and watched the situation.&nAfter Sterling brushed off her clothes and stood up, a boot took her seat.
1441100060.korean: - 나는 자연스레 파프니르의 포커 테이블로 걸어가 상황을 지켜보았다.&n스털링이 옷을 털고 일어선 후, 그녀가 앉았던 의자에는 장화가 착석했다.

1441100061.english: Babonir. I heard this place is famous for being a great restaurant.
1441100061.korean: 바보니르. 너 여기 맛집이라고 소문이 자자하던데?

1441100062.english: What do you mean "delicious restaurant"?! Do you think I'm going to lose to you too?
1441100062.korean: 맛집이라니 무슨 말이야!! 내가 너한테도 질 것 같냐?

1441100064.english: - Provoked by the dwarf, Fafnir started playing poker, furiously wagging her tail... but she kept making mistakes, discarding the wrong cards.
1441100064.korean: - 장화의 도발에 파프니르는 꼬리를 사납게 휘두르며 포커를 시작했지만… 파프니르는 계속 엉뚱한 패를 버리는 실책을 저질렀다.

1441100065.english: Excuse me, Your Majesty... Couldn't Your Majesty have predicted this as well?
1441100065.korean: 실례지만 폐하… 폐하께서도 충분히 예측하실 수 있지 않으십니까?

1441100066.english: - Honestly, there was no way Fafnir, who didn't even know the rules properly and was just flailing around, could beat JangHwa.&nNot long after, JangHwa stood up with a smile, gathering Fafnir's chips.
1441100066.korean: - 솔직히 말해, 룰도 제대로 모르고 헛발질하는 파프니르가 장화에게 이길 리 없었다.&n얼마 지나지 않아, 장화는 미소를 지으며 파프니르의 칩들을 챙기며 일어섰다.

1441100068.english: -I wonder if she genuinely wanted to win the gold coins that were up for grabs, even though she still had plenty of chips left with Fafnir…
1441100068.korean: -경품으로 나온 금화를 진심으로 차지하고 싶었는지, 아직 파프니르가 가진 칩은 널널하게 남았긴 했지만…

1441100069.english: Here's a sucker... No. I came because I heard there was a true competitor here.
1441100069.korean: 여기에 호구... 아니. 진정한 승부사가 있다고 해서 와봤어.

1441100070.english: Fafnir. Want to play a round with us too?

1441100072.english: - At the table where Fafnir was sitting, the crew members were lined up, waiting to take her chips.
1441100072.korean: - 파프니르가 앉은 테이블에선 그녀의 칩을 따기 위한 대원들이 줄을 서서 기다리고 있었다.

1441100073.english: Lord Fafnir, you're Setting some truly remarkable records in many ways.
1441100073.korean: 파프니르님께선 여러모로 대단한 기록들을 세우고 계시군요.

1441100074.english: - The Orca crew's stakes have gotten thicker.

1441100075.english: Huh? Are you here to do Armando?

1441100077.english: It's good to see you look quite happy.

1441100078.english: Armand, can you see the probability of Fafnir winning?

1451100001.english: - I've received reports that the number of adult members visiting casinos has noticeably increased recently.
1451100001.korean: - 요즘 성인 대원들이 카지노를 방문하는 횟수가 눈에 띄게 늘었다는 보고를 받았다.

1451100002.english: - On the other hand, since I wasn't particularly interested in casinos, I'm going through days that are so boring I can hardly stand it... If I keep going like this, I might really become a useless person...
1451100002.korean: - 반면 나는 카지노에 딱히 관심이 없던 터라 정말 심심해 못 견딜 정도로 지루한 하루하루를 이어가는 중이다... 이러다간 정말 잉여인간이 될 지도…

1451100003.english: - Just as my fingers were twitching with the urge to touch the confiscated panel, a knock sounded and Vargr entered.
1451100003.korean: - 압수당한 패널을 만지고 싶은 욕구에 손가락이 꿈틀거리던 그때, 노크 소리와 함께 바르그가 안으로 들어왔다.

1451100004.english: Master, may I have a brief conversation with you?
1451100004.korean: 주인님, 잠시 대화 좀 나누어도 되겠습니까?

1451100005.english: Thank you. It's not that anything else is wrong... I came here because it seems like a concerning situation has arisen for one of our unit members.
1451100005.korean: 감사합니다. 다름이 아니라… 저희 부대원에게 우려스러운 상황이 생긴 것 같아 이곳에 왔습니다.

1451100006.english: That's... It seems my incompetent colleague has become addicted to gambling.
1451100006.korean: 그게... 못난 제 동료가 도박에 빠진 것 같습니다.

1451100007.english: - Thinking about who the unit members might be, a familiar face popped into my head.
1451100007.korean: -부대원이 누굴까, 생각하다 머릿속에선 익숙한 얼굴이 떠올랐다.

1451100008.english: Ahahaha, come at me, all of you! All the gold coins are mine!!
1451100008.korean: 아하하하하, 다 덤벼! 금화는 전부 다 내 거야!!

1451100010.english: Do you know who I'm talking about, Master?
1451100010.korean: 주인님도 제가 누구를 말씀드리는 건지 아시겠습니까?

1451100011.english: I think we should either severely scold Fafnir or, at the very least, ban her from entering the casino.
1451100011.korean: 파프니르를 크게 꾸짖거나, 그게 아니더라도 카지노에 출입을 금지 시켜야 한다고 생각합니다.

1451100012.english: It's okay now, but if you leave it as it is... you might have to go hungry for the entire month.
1451100012.korean: 지금은 괜찮지만 그대로 놔둔다면… 한 달 내내 밥을 굶고 다닐 수도 있습니다.

1451100013.english: - I never thought things would get so serious in such an unexpected way... As I got up from the chair, Vargr asked.
1451100013.korean: - 생각지도 못한 부분에서 심각하게 일이 커질 줄이야… 의자에서 몸을 일으키자 바르그가 물었다.

1451100014.english: Master, are you perhaps thinking of going to stop Fafnir?
1451100014.korean: 주인님, 혹시 파프니르를 말리러 가실 생각이십니까?

1451100015.english: - It seemed like I should probably go to the casino once, since Vargr was so worried about it.
1451100015.korean: - 아무래도 바르그가 심하게 우려하는 만큼, 한 번 카지노에 가봐야 할 것 같았다.

1451100016.english: As I entered the casino, I heard Fafnir's shout.

1451100018.korean: 하아… 대체 이게 무슨 추태지, 파프니르?

1451100019.english: - Just a few days ago, Fafnir's chip, which was so full it could pull a cart, was now starting to run low.
1451100019.korean: - 며칠 전만 해도 수레를 끌고 다닐 정도로 가득했던 파프니르의 칩은 어느새 바닥을 보이는 중이었다.

1451100020.english: Haaaang! Do it again! I can't get up like this!
1451100020.korean: 흐아아아앙! 다시해! 나 이대로는 절대 못 일어나!

1451100021.english: You have no talent for gambling, Fafnir. Get up quickly.
1451100021.korean: 넌 도박에 재능이 없다 파프니르. 어서 일어나라.

1451100022.english: No, I'm not getting up! Absolutely not until it's recovered!
1451100022.korean: 싫어, 안 일어나! 복구할 때까진 절대 안 돼!

1451100024.english: - Feeling sorry for Fafnir's expression, I glanced at the cards she was holding and whispered secretly.
1451100024.korean: - 파프니르의 표정이 딱하게 느껴져, 그녀가 잡은 패를 힐끔 보곤 몰래 귓속말했다.

1451100025.english: Huh? You want me to throw this away? But...

1451100026.english: - Hesitating, Fafnir finally discarded the card I had picked up.&nHowever, Fafnir's second loss wasn't good either.
1451100026.korean: - 머뭇거리던 파프니르는 결국 내가 집은 패를 버렸다.&n하지만 파프니르가 두 번째로 받은 패도 영 좋지 않았다.

1451100028.english: No! I walked a lot here!
1451100028.korean: 안 돼! 여기에 많이 걸었단 말이야!

1451100029.english: - After my persuasion, Fafnir hesitated and eventually folded, losing a large amount of chips.
1451100029.korean: - 내 설득에 파프니르는 망설이다 결국 패를 버렸고 많은 양의 칩을 잃게 됐다.

1451100030.english: If I lose any more here, I'll have to go hungry for the rest of the month... I should just give up and give in.
1451100030.korean: 이제 여기서 더 잃으면 한 달 내내 쫄쫄 굶고 다닐 텐데… 그만 두고 단념하도록.

1451100031.english: No! I... if I lose any more here...
1451100031.korean: 싫어! 나… 나 여기서 더 잃으면…

1451100032.english: There's a limit to how much I can indulge your whining, Fafnir. Stop making a fool of yourself in front of Master...
1451100032.korean: 투정 받아주는 것도 한도가 있다, 파프니르. 주인님 앞에서 그만 추태를 보이…

1451100033.english: - I pulled up a chair next to Fafnir and sat down.
1451100033.korean: - 나는 파프니르의 옆에 의자를 끌고 와 앉았다.

1451100034.english: - As Fafnir rubbed her swollen eyes and nodded, I sat down and took a deep breath.
1451100034.korean: -파프니르가 퉁퉁 부은 눈을 비비며 고개를 끄덕거리자, 나는 자리에 앉곤 심호흡을 했다.

1451100035.english: What? The commander is personally stepping up as a black knight? This looks interesting!
1451100035.korean: 뭐야. 사령관이 직접 흑기사로 나서주는 거야? 이거 재밌겠는데?

1451100036.english: - Instead of answering, I smiled leisurely and started the game.
1451100036.korean: -나는 대답 대신 여유롭게 웃으며 게임을 시작했다.

1451100037.english: - The first hand I was dealt... honestly, it was good. However, I couldn't let my expression show. Because the salamander had to raise the stakes.
1451100037.korean: -처음 내가 받은 패는… 솔직히 좋았다. 하지만, 표정을 들켜선 안 되었다. 샐러맨더가 판돈을 키워줘야 했으니까.

1451100038.english: Commander? You don't look happy. Did you get a bad hand?
1451100038.korean: 사령관? 표정이 좋지 않네, 패가 잘못 나오기라도 했어?

1451100039.english: You're relaxed, aren't you? I was trying to end the game with this. You're saying it's a shame to lose here already?
1451100039.korean: 여유로운데? 난 이거로 게임을 끝내려 했거든. 여기서 벌써 지면 아쉽다고?

1451100040.english: Are you really sure you won't regret this, Commander?
1451100040.korean: 진짜 후회 안 할 자신 있어, 사령관?

1451100041.english: -After all the times I've been swindled by the salamander and the werewolf's rigged gambling... I've already seen through that kind of bluff.
1451100041.korean: -그간 샐러맨더랑 워울프의 사기도박에 얼마나 당했는데… 그 정도 허세는 이미 간파했다.

1451100042.english: Didn't you get completely wiped out last time you were showing off?

1451100043.english: - After starting to make their poker hands like that, when it was time to reveal, they showed their hands to each other.
1451100043.korean: -그렇게 포커의 패를 만들기 시작한 후, 개봉의 시간이 되자 서로의 패를 공개했다.

1451100044.english: Alright, straight... So, where should we open it...

1451100045.english: - I proudly laid out five heart-patterned cards in a row.
1451100045.korean: -나는 자랑스럽게 하트 무늬 카드 5장을 주르륵 내밀었다.

1451100046.english: Huh? This wasn't a low hand at all...?
1451100046.korean: 하아? 이게 낮은 패가 절대 아니었는데…?

1451100047.english: - Over the years, I've been cheated countless times by the werewolves and salamanders, and I've gradually figured out their betting patterns.
1451100047.korean: -그간 워울프와 샐러맨더에게 수많은 사기도박을 당하며 어느새 그녀들의 베팅 패턴을 파악했다.

1451100048.english: Ugh, I raised a tiger, didn't I? Not bad, Commander.
1451100048.korean: 하아, 이거 내가 호랑이를 키웠는데? 제법이야 사령관.

1451100049.english: -Salamander finally gave a bitter smile, and after that, even tho she received consecutive challenges from Salamander and the Werewolf, saying she couldn't lose anymore...
1451100049.korean: -샐러맨더는 결국 쓴웃음을 지었다, 그 이후로도 질 수 없다며 샐러맨더와 워울프에게 연달아 대결 신청을 받았지만…

1451100050.korean: 마, 말도 안 돼… 엄청 잘 하잖아?

1451100051.english: - Without losing anything further, they succeeded in recovering a significant number of the chips that Fafnir had lost.
1451100051.korean: - 더는 잃는 일 없이, 파프니르가 잃었던 칩을 상당수 복구하는데 성공했다.

1451100053.english: - Instead of answering, I put all the chips on Fafnir and stood up.
1451100053.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 파프니르에게 칩을 모두 몰아준 뒤 일어섰다.

1451100055.english: Fafnir, can't you even say thank you to your master? Who won back all the chips they had lost?
1451100055.korean: 파프니르, 주인님께 감사하단 말도 못하나? 잃었던 칩을 도로 다 따준 게 누구지?

1451100056.english: - I gently stroked Fafnir's head.&nIt had a rather pleasant texture, and her tail swayed gently.
1451100056.korean: - 나는 파프니르의 머리를 쓱쓱 쓰다듬었다. &n꽤 기분 좋은 감촉이었고 그녀의 꼬리가 살랑거렸다.

1451100057.english: Okay... I'll put it on and come...
1451100057.korean: 애 취급 하지 마! 나도 잘 할 수 있다고!

1451100058.english: - Fafnir huffed, gathered all the chips, and left.
1451100058.korean: - 파프니르는 씩씩거리며 칩을 모두 챙긴 채 자리를 떴다.

1451100060.english: - Instead of answering, I grabbed Vargr's shoulder and said,
1451100060.korean: -나는 대답 대신 바르그의 어깨를 붙잡고 말했다.

1451100061.english: Still, that's not respectful to Master. I'll fix their bad habits...
1451100061.korean: 그래도 저건, 주인님에 대한 예의가 아닙니다. 제가 버릇을 고쳐놓겠…

1451100062.english: - Vargr huffed for no reason, but I gently stroked her head.
1451100062.korean: - 바르그는 괜스레 씩씩거렸으나, 나는 바르그의 머리를 부드럽게 쓸어주었다.

1451100063.english: Master... why are you protecting such a rude child?
1451100063.korean: 주인님… 저런 버릇 없는 아이를 어째서 감싸십니까?

1451100064.english: I'm not quite sure what you mean...

1451100066.english: -Fafnir probably doesn't want to show her clumsy side either.
1451100066.korean: -파프니르도 내심, 자신이 칠칠지 못한 모습을 보여주고 싶진 않은 모양이겠지.

1451100067.english: - I decided to keep a closer eye on Fafnir.
1451100067.korean: - 나는 파프니르를 좀 더 지켜보기로 했다.

1451100069.english: I saw you run out rudely to see what you were doing, and you're crying again?&nSo you really hated being treated like an idiot, huh?
1451100069.korean: 버릇 없이 튀어나가 뭘 하나 봤더니 또 울고 있는 건가? &n그렇게도 모지리 취급 당하는 게 싫었나 보지?

1451100070.english: No, actually, that's not it... I...
1451100070.korean: 아냐, 사실 그게 아니란 말이야… 난…

1451100072.english: So, I'm doing this because I don't want to worry them.&nMe too... I don't want to be like this...
1451100072.korean: 그러니까, 걔한테 걱정 끼치기 싫어서 그래. &n나도… 이러고 싶어서 이런 게 아니야…

1451100073.english: You're worried she might treat you like someone untrustworthy, right.
1451100073.korean: 혹시라도 걔한테 못 미더운 애 취급 받을까 그런 거지.

1451100074.english: I heard the Empress likes you, but... I've never been properly praised by her before...&nEven after coming here, she keeps losing confidence... you can tell by the way she's been acting lately."
1451100074.korean: 넌 여제 아줌마가 좋아해줬다고 들었지만… 난 여태껏 아줌마한테 제대로 칭찬 받아본 적 없어…&n여기 와서도 자꾸 자신감이 없어진다고… 요즘 걔가 그러는 거 보면 말이야.

1451100076.english: I don't want to look pathetic even to them. I'm angry because I hate myself like this.
1451100076.korean: 걔한테까지 한심하게 보이긴 싫어. 이런 내가 싫어서 화가 나.

1451100081.english: How much have you lost so far?

1451100082.english: If they're going too far, you should stop them.

1451100084.korean: 내 말대로 한 번 해 봐.

1451100085.english: This hand isn't good. Die and start over.
1451100085.korean: 이번은 패가 안 좋네. 죽고 다시 시작해.

1451100086.english: It's better than losing any more here.

1451100088.english: Because I didn't bring my wallet. Can you lend it to me?
1451100088.korean: 내가 지갑을 안 들고 와서. 빌려줄 수 있어?

1451100090.english: The mighty salamander has a long tongue?

1451100091.english: Even if I can't eat it, I have to go and see.

1451100094.english: If you're not sure, don't gamble. Haven't you learned that?
1451100094.korean: 확실하지 않으면 승부를 걸지 마라. 안 배웠어?

1451100096.english: It's okay. Because I enjoyed it.

1451100097.english: It's probably because their pride was hurt.

1451100098.english: Didn't Vargr also have times like that?

1451100099.english: I have no intention of serving you as my master.
1451100099.korean: 난 너를 주인으로 모실 생각이 없.

1461100001.english: - Today, the familiar roar of Fafnir could be heard at the casino again.
1461100001.korean: - 오늘도 카지노에선 익숙한 파프니르의 고함이 들렸다.

1461100002.english: Eeeeeeeek!! Ugh... Haa... ugh... again, again I lost...
1461100002.korean: 이이이이익!! 으으... 하아… 으읏… 또, 또 잃었어…

1461100003.english: - Honestly, Fafnir's poker skills were close to the bottom.&nI distinctly remember that when I was helping, the number of chips we recovered was quite significant...
1461100003.korean: - 솔직히 파프니르의 포커 실력은 바닥에 가까웠다.&n분명 내가 도와줄 때만 하더라도 복구한 칩의 양이 꽤 많았던 걸로 기억하는데…

1461100005.english: - Fafnir puffed out her cheeks. It seemed like they were sulking... but seeing their tail wagging at the same time, I couldn't help but smile.
1461100005.korean: -파프니르는 볼을 부풀렸다. 토라진 것 같기도… 그러면서도 꼬리를 살랑거리는 걸 보니 숨길 수 없는 미소가 지어졌다.

1461100006.english: - Reluctantly, I sat next to Fafnir again today.&nAs soon as she received her hand, Fafnir, who had been peeking at her cards, shouted.
1461100006.korean: -하는 수 없이 나는 오늘도 파프니르의 옆자리에 다시 앉았다. &n패를 받자, 빼꼼 패를 보던 파프니르가 소리쳤다.

1461100007.english: Wow, this is a bit high, uh...?!

1461100008.english: I sighed, plugging Fafnir's mouth. Not long after we were together, Fafnir's chip had also recovered to its former level.
1461100008.korean: 파프니르의 입을 틀어막곤 한숨을 쉬었다, 함깨한지 얼마 지나지 않아, 파프니르의 칩도 다시금 예전 수준으로 복구되었다.

1461100009.english: How did you do that?! Why are you so good at this?!
1461100009.korean: 너 어떻게 한 거야?! 왜 이렇게 잘하는 건데!!

1461100010.english: - I got so good because I kept getting beaten up by the Horde guys. I used to get wiped out all the time at first too.
1461100010.korean: - 호드 애들한테 하도 당하다보니 실력이 엄청 늘어난 거지, 나도 처음에는 맨날 털리기 일쑤였다.

1461100011.english: Teach me! I want to win too!

1461100012.english: - I stood up after giving Fafnir the chips I had won, but...
1461100012.korean: - 나는 파프니르에게 내가 땄던 칩들을 몰아주곤 일어섰지만…

1461100013.english: - Fafnir kept following me around with a strange look in her eyes.
1461100013.korean: - 파프니르는 묘한 눈빛으로 계속 나를 쫄래쫄래 따라왔다.

1461100014.english: Wait! I have something I want to ask...&nI know... that I always do stupid things. But I'm curious...
1461100014.korean: 기다려! 나 물어보고 싶은 거 있어… &n나도 알아… 내가 늘 바보 같은 짓만 한다는 거. 그치만 궁금해…

1461100015.english: But why... Are you not angry with me, like Sterling?
1461100015.korean: 근데 왜... 스털링처럼 나한테 화 안 내는 거야?

1461100017.english: You're always smiling and accepting, so why... that is, why are you like that? Honestly, I'm not sure...
1461100017.korean: 맨날 웃으면서 잘 받아주고, 왜 그런데… 그, 그러니까. 나 솔직히 잘 모르겠어...

1461100018.english: - Fafnir hesitated at my question, then continued in a sniffly voice.
1461100018.korean: - 파프니르는 내 질문에 우물쭈물하더니 이내 훌쩍거리는 목소리로 말을 이었다.

1461100019.english: You know, I was actually really picked on by the Empress.
1461100019.korean: 나 말이야, 사실 여제 아줌마한테 엄청 구박 받았어.

1461100020.english: A fool, completely unsuited for terrorism or assassination... a fool.
1461100020.korean: 바보라고, 테러나 암살에는 전혀 어울리지 못하는… 바보.

1461100021.english: - Come to think of it, I forgot that Fafnir was a member of Maria's terrorist organization, the Empress Hound.
1461100021.korean: - 생각해보니, 파프니르가 마리아의 테러조직, 엠프레시스 하운드의 일원이란 걸 잊고 있었다.

1461100022.english: - Regarding JangHwa, I heard she was mentally and physically abused by Maria.
1461100022.korean: - 장화 같은 경우에는 마리아에게 정신적으로나 육체적으로 학대를 당했다고 들었다.

1461100023.english: I always get scolded by the Empress, and the kids always call me an idiot... so...
1461100023.korean: 여제 아줌마한텐 맨날 혼나지, 애들한텐 맨날 바보 소리만 들었지… 그러니까…

1461100024.english: You think I'm pathetic too, right? So you're helping, right?
1461100024.korean: 너도 날 한심하게 생각하는 거지? 그래서 도와주는 거지?

1461100025.english: - I shook my head at Fafnir's question.
1461100025.korean: - 파프니르의 질문에 나는 고개를 도리도리 내저었다.

1461100026.english: So, how do you feel about me?

1461100027.english: You don't have to say such nice things. You know I'm pathetic, so you came to help out of pity, right?&nStill... thank you. Because you're saying something nice, unlike the Empress.
1461100027.korean: 그렇게 듣기 좋은 말 안 해줘도 돼. 너도 내가 한심하다는 거 아니까, 불쌍해서 도와주러 온 거잖아…&n그래도… 고마워. 여제 아줌마보단 좋은 소리 해줘서.

1461100028.english: - Fafnir trudged away from me with heavy footsteps, heading toward the lodging.
1461100028.korean: - 파프니르는 터덜거리는 발걸음으로 나를 뒤로한 채 숙소를 향해 걸어갔다.

1461100030.english: You came early today. Did Master pick a lot again?
1461100030.korean: 오늘은 일찍 왔군. 또 주인님께서 많이 따주셨나?

1461100031.english: No. Just... I came early because I wasn't feeling well.
1461100031.korean: 아냐. 그냥... 기분 별로라서 일찍 왔어.

1461100032.english: Hooh, I thought you'd come back losing all the money Master gave you again. Looks like your self-control has improved.
1461100032.korean: 호오, 또 주인님께서 따준 돈을 그대로 다 잃고 오는 줄 알았는데. 자제력이 늘었군.

1461100035.english: What's the question? I'm a bit tired from my part-time job and work with the gentleman, so I hope this isn't a pointless question.
1461100035.korean: 무슨 질문이지? 알바랑 신사 일 때문에 조금 피곤하니 쓸데 없는 질문이 아니었음 좋겠군.

1461100036.english: You know... didn't you also get called a traitor when you first came here?
1461100036.korean: 너 말이야… 너도 처음에 여기 왔을 땐 배신자라고 한 소리 들었다면서?

1461100037.english: That's right. Why are you asking that?

1461100038.english: Didn't you feel upset or angry after hearing that? So, even if they said they were okay... they probably weren't feeling good, right?
1461100038.korean: 넌 그런 거 듣고 속상하거나 화나지 않았어? 그러니까, 걔는 괜찮다고 말했어도… 기분이 좋진 않았을 거 아냐.

1461100039.english: Since I was the one who started this, I have no regrets.&n... There's no excuse for betraying Master after being deceived by Delta.
1461100039.korean: 내가 벌였던 일이기에 억울한 건 없다. &n...델타 말에 속아 주인님을 배신하려고 했던 건 변명의 여지가 없다.

1461100040.english: But what's important is the future, not the past... Even if you regret the past, it won't come back.
1461100040.korean: 하지만 과거보다 중요한 건 미래다… 과거의 일을 후회한다 해도 되돌아 오지 않는다.

1461100041.english: If I've chosen the being I'm now willing to give my life for as my master, then shouldn't I just devote everything I have and be loyal, even now?
1461100041.korean: 지금 내가 목숨을 바치는 존재를 주인님으로 정했다면, 지금이라도 내 모든 걸 바쳐 충성하면 되는 것 아니겠나?

1461100042.english: Fafnir, if you know your complexes, why don't you try to overcome them?
1461100042.korean: 파프니르, 너도 네 콤플렉스를 알고 있다면, 그걸 극복하려고 노력하면 되지 않나?
